seoTitle: How to Merge Two Udemy Accounts Without Losing Courses
metaDescription: Consolidate two Udemy accounts into one so all your purchased courses live in a single place, using the account settings that handle merging.
intro: It's common to end up with two Udemy accounts after signing up with different emails or forgetting old credentials, which splits your courses across separate logins. This shows how to access the merge settings and combine both accounts so nothing gets lost along the way.

steps.heading: Access your account settings
steps.body: Sign in to the Udemy account you want to keep as your primary one and open its account settings.

steps.heading: Find the account merging option
steps.body: Locate the setting that lets you combine a second account into the one you're currently using.

steps.heading: Follow the merge steps
steps.body: Enter the details for the second account and complete the process Udemy provides to combine them.

steps.heading: Confirm all your courses are present
steps.body: After merging, check your dashboard to make sure courses from both accounts now appear together.

faq.question: Will I lose any courses when merging two Udemy accounts?
faq.answer: The merge process is designed to bring courses from both accounts together, but it's worth reviewing your dashboard afterward to confirm everything transferred.

faq.question: Can I merge more than two accounts?
faq.answer: This guide covers combining two accounts; if you have more than two, you'd likely repeat the process for each additional one.

faq.question: What happens to my old account after merging?
faq.answer: Once merged, you'll typically use your primary account going forward, with the secondary account's content folded into it.

faq.question: Is merging accounts useful for someone managing a business library of courses?
faq.answer: Yes, consolidating accounts helps keep all purchased courses organized in one place rather than scattered across logins.
